{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "SME Relationship Manager",
  "description": "Sovereign Finance Limited is a leading financial services provider with a prime desire to promote trailblazing Financial &amp; Investment solutions to customers in different sectors of the Nigerian economy. Our priority is to create opportunities for our clients to save accumulated capital and build sustainable wealth.&nbsp;&nbsp;The company is founded by a team of savvy finance &amp; investment specialist with evidence of track&nbsp;record of exceptional performance, superb integrity, and innovation. The company is at the center of financial innovation propelled by technological prowess and is at a position of pre-eminence in the Nigeria financial Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: SME Relationship Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and customer-focused SME Relationship Manager to build and manage a portfolio of Small and Medium Enterprise (SME) clients.
	The role involves driving business growth by offering tailored financial solutions, deepening client relationships, and ensuring high-quality service delivery.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and manage a portfolio of SME clients to achieve revenue and growth targets
	Demonstrated ability to originate and manage SME portfolios
	Strong credit appraisal and structuring capabilities
	Capacity to drive both asset creation and liability mobilization


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field
	5&ndash;7years of experience in SME banking, relationship management, or sales
	Strong understanding of credit analysis and financial statements
	Proven ability to meet sales and portfolio growth targets.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@sovereignfinanceltd.com&nbsp;sing the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

SME Relationship Manager Job at Sovereign Finance Limited




        
    

        
        Sovereign Finance Limited is a leading financial services provider with a prime desire to promote trailblazing Financial & Investment solutions to customers in different sectors of the Nigerian economy. Our priority is to create opportunities for our clients to save accumulated capital and build sustainable wealth.  The company is founded by a team of savvy finance & investment specialist with evidence of track record of exceptional performance, superb integrity, and innovation. The company is at the center of financial innovation propelled by technological prowess and is at a position of pre-eminence in the Nigeria financial Industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: SME Relationship Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and customer-focused SME Relationship Manager to build and manage a portfolio of Small and Medium Enterprise (SME) clients.
	The role involves driving business growth by offering tailored financial solutions, deepening client relationships, and ensuring high-quality service delivery.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and manage a portfolio of SME clients to achieve revenue and growth targets
	Demonstrated ability to originate and manage SME portfolios
	Strong credit appraisal and structuring capabilities
	Capacity to drive both asset creation and liability mobilization


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field
	5–7years of experience in SME banking, relationship management, or sales
	Strong understanding of credit analysis and financial statements
	Proven ability to meet sales and portfolio growth targets.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] sing the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR & Admin Manager",
  "description": "Cheaper Beta Enterprises is fast growing company with focus to provide consumers goods and services at the best market price . We are continually creating an atmosphere for employees to grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR &amp; Admin Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Magodo Phase 2, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Days: Monday to Friday - 8am to 5pm

About the Role


	We are seeking a highly structured, proactive, and disciplined HR &amp; Admin Manager to oversee people operations, administrative systems, and workplace efficiency across our growing brands.
	This role is critical to ensuring that our team operates with excellence, accountability, and consistency, while maintaining a premium standard in both staff conduct and internal processes.


Key Responsibilities
Human Resources (Core Function):


	Lead recruitment, onboarding, and staff documentation
	Develop and enforce company policies, SOPs, and disciplinary processes
	Monitor staff attendance, punctuality, and performance
	Handle staff welfare, conflict resolution, and engagement
	Drive a culture of accountability, professionalism, and results.


Performance &amp; Accountability:


	Track staff productivity, sales contribution, and KPIs
	Conduct periodic staff evaluations and reviews
	Ensure compliance with company standards and reporting structures
	Implement systems to improve staff efficiency and output.


Administrative Management:


	Oversee daily operations and ensure smooth workflow across all departments
	Manage schedules, meetings, and internal coordination
	Maintain proper documentation and filing systems
	Supervise front desk operations and client flow structure.


Compliance &amp; Control:


	Work closely with the accountant to ensure payroll accuracy
	Monitor staff-related expenses and operational costs
	Ensure adherence to company policies, ethics, and standards.


Process Improvement:


	Identify gaps in operations and implement improved systems
	Introduce tools and processes to enhance efficiency and structure
	Support business growth by ensuring operational readiness.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in HR, Business Administration, or related fields
	3 - 5 years of experience in HR/Admin role
	CIPM certified
	Strong leadership, communication, and organizational skills
	Experience managing teams in a structured environment
	High level of discipline, discretion, and attention to detail.


What We Are Looking For


	Someone firm but fair
	Highly organized and proactive
	Strong in execution, not just planning
	Able to enforce structure without losing team morale
	Passionate about building systems and growing people.


Why Join Us


	Salary: N250,000 monthly.
	Be part of a fast-growing brand
	Opportunity to shape culture, structure, and growth
	Work in a purpose-driven, high-impact environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;info.cheaperbeta@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;HR &amp; Admin&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

HR & Admin Manager Job at Cheaper Beta Enterprises




        
    

        
        Cheaper Beta Enterprises is fast growing company with focus to provide consumers goods and services at the best market price . We are continually creating an atmosphere for employees to grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR & Admin Manager

Job Location: Magodo Phase 2, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Days: Monday to Friday - 8am to 5pm

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly structured, proactive, and disciplined HR & Admin Manager to oversee people operations, administrative systems, and workplace efficiency across our growing brands.
	This role is critical to ensuring that our team operates with excellence, accountability, and consistency, while maintaining a premium standard in both staff conduct and internal processes.


Key Responsibilities
Human Resources (Core Function):


	Lead recruitment, onboarding, and staff documentation
	Develop and enforce company policies, SOPs, and disciplinary processes
	Monitor staff attendance, punctuality, and performance
	Handle staff welfare, conflict resolution, and engagement
	Drive a culture of accountability, professionalism, and results.


Performance & Accountability:


	Track staff productivity, sales contribution, and KPIs
	Conduct periodic staff evaluations and reviews
	Ensure compliance with company standards and reporting structures
	Implement systems to improve staff efficiency and output.


Administrative Management:


	Oversee daily operations and ensure smooth workflow across all departments
	Manage schedules, meetings, and internal coordination
	Maintain proper documentation and filing systems
	Supervise front desk operations and client flow structure.


Compliance & Control:


	Work closely with the accountant to ensure payroll accuracy
	Monitor staff-related expenses and operational costs
	Ensure adherence to company policies, ethics, and standards.


Process Improvement:


	Identify gaps in operations and implement improved systems
	Introduce tools and processes to enhance efficiency and structure
	Support business growth by ensuring operational readiness.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in HR, Business Administration, or related fields
	3 - 5 years of experience in HR/Admin role
	CIPM certified
	Strong leadership, communication, and organizational skills
	Experience managing teams in a structured environment
	High level of discipline, discretion, and attention to detail.


What We Are Looking For


	Someone firm but fair
	Highly organized and proactive
	Strong in execution, not just planning
	Able to enforce structure without losing team morale
	Passionate about building systems and growing people.


Why Join Us


	Salary: N250,000 monthly.
	Be part of a fast-growing brand
	Opportunity to shape culture, structure, and growth
	Work in a purpose-driven, high-impact environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “HR & Admin” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Medical Officer Job at Ajayi Crowther University




        
    

        
        Ajayi Crowther University, Oyo, was founded by the Church of Nigeria (Anglican Communion), and licensed by the Federal Republic of Nigeria in January 2005 to operate as a private university. It is located on Oyo-Ogbomoso Road on the site of the old St. Andrew's College, Oyo. Her Vision is "to be a top-class institution in the pursuit of knowledge and scholarship through teaching, learning, research and exemplary service to humanity", and her Mission is "to produce graduates who are imbued with the fear of God and sense of service to humanity and who are endowed with a well- rounded education to enable them operate successfully both as private entrepreneurs and top flight workers in the private and public sectors of the Nation's economy".
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Applications are hereby invited from suitably qualified candidates for the vacant position of Medical Officer (CONMESS02) in the University health Centre, as indicated below:

Job Position: Medical Officer

Job Location: Oyo

Qualifications


	The candidate should possess 5 O'Level credits pass (WAEC/NECO/GCE) including English Language and Mathematics plus a Degree in Medicine, registrable with the Medical and Dental Council of Nigeria (MDCN) from a recognized institution.
	The candidate must provide evidence of NYSC Certificate, Exemption or Exclusion as the case may be with one-year post registration cognate experience.


Method of Application

Interested and qualified candidates are required to submit 15 typewritten copies of their applications, credentials and curriculum vitae giving information in the following format:


	Full names, with surname in capitals
	Date of birth, town and state of origin
	Nationality
	Religion and Denomination
	(Current Contact Address/Telephone No(s)
	E-mail address
	Permanent Home Address
	Marital status
	(Number of children with names and ages
	Institution(s) attended (with dates)
	Academic qualifications (with dates)
	Professional qualifications (with dates)
	Work experience: General and Specific experience (with dates)
	(Present employment, status, salary and employer
	List of publications in details (if any)
	Extra-curricular activities
	Names and addresses of 3 referees (two of who must be Professionals or authorities in the Medical Field) who must be requested by the applicant to forward directly to the Registrar, confidential reports on him/her indicating the post desired.


Applications are to be addressed and submitted to:
The Registrar,
Ajayi Crowther University,
P. M.B. 1066,
Ogbomoso Road,
Oyo State, Nigeria.

Note


	All applications are to be submitted, marked POST OF MEDICAL OFFICER, at the top-left corner of the sealed envelope.
	A soft copy should be forwarded to [email protected]
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Human Resource Assistant",
  "description": "The Startup Place Limited is a Business Consulting firm with key focus on Startup Development, Digital Marketing and Business Growth. We pull a team of passionate entrepreneurs and consultant about helping you start, grow and scale your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Human Resource Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Hybrid)

Role Description


	This is a full-time hybrid role for a Human Resource Assistant based in Lagos. The role allows a mix of in-office and remote work.
	Responsibilities include assisting with HR tasks, providing excellent customer service, managing employee records, supporting training initiatives, and maintaining effective communication within the organization.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field is preferred
	Strong Communication and Customer Service skills
	Knowledge of Human Resources processes and procedures
	Experience with Training and development practices
	Ability to work collaboratively and maintain a professional demeanor
	Organizational and time management skills
	Proficiency in using office tools and basic HR software.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@thestartupplaceng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Human Resource Assistant Job at the Startup Place Limited




        
    

        
        The Startup Place Limited is a Business Consulting firm with key focus on Startup Development, Digital Marketing and Business Growth. We pull a team of passionate entrepreneurs and consultant about helping you start, grow and scale your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource Assistant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Role Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	This is a full-time hybrid role for a Human Resource Assistant based in Lagos. The role allows a mix of in-office and remote work.
	Responsibilities include assisting with HR tasks, providing excellent customer service, managing employee records, supporting training initiatives, and maintaining effective communication within the organization.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field is preferred
	Strong Communication and Customer Service skills
	Knowledge of Human Resources processes and procedures
	Experience with Training and development practices
	Ability to work collaboratively and maintain a professional demeanor
	Organizational and time management skills
	Proficiency in using office tools and basic HR software.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Video Editor for Faceless YouTube Channel",
  "description": "HotNaija is a media company - we produce content that keep viewers watching and reach millions of people every month.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Video Editor for Faceless YouTube Channel

Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria (Remote)

Job Summary


	We are looking for a skilled and creative video editor to help grow a faceless YouTube channel.
	The ideal candidate understands how to keep viewers engaged using visuals, pacing, and storytelling &mdash; without relying on on-camera presence.
	This is a long-term opportunity if the fit is right.


What You&rsquo;ll Do


	Edit engaging faceless YouTube videos
	Use stock footage, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design to tell compelling stories
	Maintain fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality
	Follow scripts and bring them to life creatively
	Add background music, sound effects, and smooth transitions
	Keep up with current YouTube editing trends and retention strategies


Requirements


	Proven experience editing faceless YouTube content (must provide portfolio or samples)
	Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention
	Proficiency in tools like Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar editing software
	Ability to work quickly and meet deadlines consistently
	Creative mindset &mdash; not just editing, but enhancing the content
	Good communication and openness to feedback


Nice to Have:


	Experience with viral-style or high-retention YouTube content
	Motion graphics or animation skills
	Understanding of YouTube audience psychology.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their portfolio or sample videos to:&nbsp;contact@hotnaija.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.


	Links to your best faceless YouTube edits
	A brief note on your editing style and experience
	We look forward to working with someone who can bring ideas to life!

Video Editor for Faceless YouTube Channel Job at HotNaija




        
    

        
        HotNaija is a media company - we produce content that keep viewers watching and reach millions of people every month.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Video Editor for Faceless YouTube Channel

Job Location: Nigeria (Remote)

Job Summary


	We are looking for a skilled and creative video editor to help grow a faceless YouTube channel.
	The ideal candidate understands how to keep viewers engaged using visuals, pacing, and storytelling — without relying on on-camera presence.
	This is a long-term opportunity if the fit is right.


What You’ll Do
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Edit engaging faceless YouTube videos
	Use stock footage, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design to tell compelling stories
	Maintain fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality
	Follow scripts and bring them to life creatively
	Add background music, sound effects, and smooth transitions
	Keep up with current YouTube editing trends and retention strategies


Requirements


	Proven experience editing faceless YouTube content (must provide portfolio or samples)
	Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention
	Proficiency in tools like Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar editing software
	Ability to work quickly and meet deadlines consistently
	Creative mindset — not just editing, but enhancing the content
	Good communication and openness to feedback


Nice to Have:


	Experience with viral-style or high-retention YouTube content
	Motion graphics or animation skills
	Understanding of YouTube audience psychology.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their portfolio or sample videos to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.


	Links to your best faceless YouTube edits
	A brief note on your editing style and experience
	We look forward to working with someone who can bring ideas to life!
    

    

        Click here to Apply
